name: tanuj
weak_topics: Binary Search (especially for logarithmic complexity problems)
mistakes: Explicitly stated lack of knowledge for a fundamental algorithm problem.
Unable to describe an approach or thought process for a problem.
Requested to end the interview prematurely, indicating disengagement.
Lack of foundational knowledge in common algorithmic patterns.
recommended_topics: Fundamental Data Structures (Arrays, Strings, Hash Maps)
Basic Algorithm Patterns (Two Pointers, Sliding Window)
Divide and Conquer Algorithms (e.g., Binary Search)
Practicing LeetCode Easy/Medium level problems to build confidence and understanding.
Understanding and articulating Time and Space Complexity.
Interview communication skills (e.g., asking clarifying questions, thinking out loud).
